Top 5 Valentine’s Day Ideas in London from @fever_uk ❤️

🎁Get 10% off with the code LONDONBY10 for the below plans (🔗links to book saved in bio): 

1.🌀Paradox Museum London (a fun and immersive interactive museum with mind-bending exhibits)

2.🕯️Nowhere to Wear It: Candle Making Workshop (a luxury sensory atelier where you craft your own candle)

3.🍽️Tasting Menu with Live Music (an exclusive multi-course dinner with wine pairings and live entertainment)

4.🎨Paint N Date: Creativity and Romance (create stunning art together in a guided session perfect for all skill levels)

5.👩‍🍳Valentine’s Day Dinner La Bibliothèque (Five-course seasonal dinner crafted for indulgence and connection)

Looking for more ideas? Discover the Valentine’s Day category on Fever💝They have a whole list of amazing plans like these. Whether you’re looking for incredible date ideas or unique gifts, you’ll find immersive experiences, special dinners, massages, and spa treatments
